meta.purpose: Course→concept mapping over the in-scope inventory (spec §1B). Applied by scripts/import_course_concepts.py.
meta.vote_protocol: 2 independent votes per course (sonnet), third-vote tiebreak on disagreement; unanimous=1.0, 2-of-3=0.67; disputes whose tiebreak was cut short by a session token limit carry flag needs_review with concept null (67 rows) — resolve manually in the console Mapping tab
meta.sample_note: G4 random-sample review pending: Tybalt reviews via the console; error rate to be recorded here afterward
